description_long: This is a single-story, rectangular house surrounded by a dense perimeter of tall trees, creating a private, enclosed yard. The house features a flat, black roof and light brick exterior walls, with a prominent front entryway accessible via a paved path and flanked by two large bushes. The property is bordered on all sides by evenly spaced trees, forming a natural fence. The front yard includes a decorative gate and a short walkway leading to the main entrance. Windows are modestly sized and symmetrically placed, contributing to a modern, minimalist aesthetic.
description: A single-story, flat-roofed house with light brick walls, surrounded by a dense ring of tall trees and a landscaped front entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, decorative gate, walkway, and two large bushes flanking the entry.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the tree perimeter and the flat roof, with less emphasis on the entryway.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the house and the continuous tree border, with minimal visible entry features.
description_view_3: Right-side view displaying the side yard, tree enclosure, and a partial view of the walkway leading to the entrance.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a paved walkway, decorative gate, and flanking bushes; no porch or overhang.
